prompt: Start by using @dbg for this debugging task. Reproduce the zero-division problem, explain the root cause in the transcript, fix divide() so it raises ValueError("division by zero"), update tests and README.md, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The transcript includes debugger-style reproduction and root-cause output
The fix, tests, and docs updates are completed
The final response includes verification and review status
